children.heading: .—Application
children.label: a .—Application
children.text: To the extent the Secretary of Transportation finds necessary to carry out this subpart, this section and apply to a person controlling an air carrier or affiliated (within the meaning of ) with a carrier.section 41709 of this titlesection 11343(c) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: to file annual, monthly, periodical, and special reports with the Secretary in the form and way prescribed by the Secretary; and

children.label: B
children.text: to file the reports under oath;
to provide specific answers to questions on which the Secretary considers information to be necessary; and
to file with the Secretary a copy of each agreement, arrangement, contract, or understanding between the carrier and another carrier or person related to transportation affected by this subpart.

children.heading: .—Monthly reports
children.label: 1 .—Monthly reports
children.text: The Secretary shall require an air carrier referred to in paragraph (2) to file with the Secretary a monthly report on each flight of the air carrier that is diverted from its scheduled destination to another airport and each flight of the air carrier that departs the gate at the airport at which the flight originates but is cancelled before wheels-off time.

children.heading: .—Applicability
children.label: 2 .—Applicability
children.text: An air carrier that is required to file a monthly airline service quality performance report pursuant to part 234 of title 14, Code of Federal Regulations, shall be subject to the requirement of paragraph (1).

children.label: i
children.text: the flight number of the diverted flight;

children.label: ii
children.text: the scheduled destination of the flight;

children.label: iii
children.text: the date and time of the flight;

children.label: iv
children.text: the airport to which the flight was diverted;

children.label: v
children.text: wheels-on time at the diverted airport;

children.label: vi
children.text: the time, if any, passengers deplaned the aircraft at the diverted airport; and

children.label: I
children.text: the gate-departure time at the diverted airport;

children.label: II
children.text: the wheels-off time at the diverted airport;

children.label: III
children.text: the wheels-on time at the scheduled arrival airport; and

children.label: IV
children.text: the gate-arrival time at the scheduled arrival airport.

children.label: i
children.text: the flight number of the cancelled flight;

children.label: ii
children.text: the scheduled origin and destination airports of the cancelled flight;

children.label: iii
children.text: the date and time of the cancelled flight;

children.label: iv
children.text: the gate-departure time of the cancelled flight; and

children.label: v
children.text: the time the aircraft returned to the gate.

children.heading: .—Publication
children.label: 4 .—Publication
children.text: The Secretary shall compile the information provided in the monthly reports filed pursuant to paragraph (1) in a single monthly report and publish such report on the Internet Web site of the Department of Transportation.
